title: Ad hoc support to support single port memory
body:
@cliffordwolf 

Not at all ready for release.  But proposing as a means of discussion.

Summary:

- Mechanism to enable: add force_single_port in rules file
- During pass, detect if read address and write address are the same
-If force_single_pass is enable for bram and same_wr_rd_addr set, then skip emission of B1ADDR (aka 2nd port)

Potential problems:

- Does not consider true single port with single data pins.  Workaround is to add muxing and/or tristate logic in techmap.
- Pretty naive implementaiton, author not familiar with other features (and legacy code) in the memory bram pass.


Consider the following rule file.

~~~~
bram sram_1rw_16b_16w_1bank_freepdk45
init 0
abits 4
dbits 16
groups 2
ports  1 1
wrmode 1 0
enable 1 1
transp 0 0
clocks 1 1
clkpol 1 1
endbram

match sram_1rw_16b_16w_1bank_freepdk45
force_single_port
min efficiency 100
endmatch
~~~~

And this verilog single port RAM model:

~~~~
module top (clock, adr, rdat, wen, wdat);
  parameter ABITS = 4;
  parameter DBITS = 16;

  input              clock;
  input      [ABITS-1:0] adr;
  output reg [DBITS-1:0] rdat;
  input              wen;
  input      [DBITS-1:0] wdat;

  localparam DEPTH = 2**ABITS;

  reg [DBITS-1:0] memory[0:DEPTH-1];
  reg [ABITS-1:0] adr_d1;

  always @(posedge clock) begin
    if (wen)
      memory[adr] <= wdat;
    else
    rdat <= memory[adr];
  end
endmodule
~~~~

And, this synthesis script:

~~~~
read_ilang ../YosysPass1/pass1__top.ilang
hierarchy -check -top top
synth -top top -noabc -noshare -run coarse
write_ilang before_map.ilang
memory_bram -rules /home/edc/gitrepos/openram/lib/freepdk45/configs/rules
write_ilang after_map.ilang
~~~~

File before_map.ilang:

~~~~
  cell $mem \memory
    parameter \ABITS 4
    parameter \INIT 1'x
    parameter \MEMID "\\memory"
    parameter \OFFSET 0
    parameter \RD_CLK_ENABLE 1'1
    parameter \RD_CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \RD_PORTS 1
    parameter \RD_TRANSPARENT 1'0
    parameter \SIZE 16
    parameter \WIDTH 16
    parameter \WR_CLK_ENABLE 1'1
    parameter \WR_CLK_POLARITY 1'1
    parameter \WR_PORTS 1
    connect \RD_ADDR \adr
    connect \RD_CLK \clock
    connect \RD_DATA \rdat
    connect \RD_EN $auto$rtlil.cc:1675:LogicNot$26
    connect \WR_ADDR \adr
    connect \WR_CLK \clock
    connect \WR_DATA \wdat
~~~~

File after_map.ilang (not missing B1ADDR)

~~~~
 cell \sram_1rw_16b_16w_1bank_freepdk45 \memory.0.0.0
    connect \A1ADDR \adr
    connect \A1DATA \wdat
    connect \A1EN $0$memwr$\memory$/home/edc/gitrepos/rocket-engine/target/scala-2.11/classes/designs/verilog/single_port_mem.v:18$1_EN[15:0]$5 [15]
    connect \B1DATA $auto$memory_bram.cc:918:replace_cell$28
    connect \B1EN $auto$rtlil.cc:1675:LogicNot$26
    connect \CLK1 \clock
  end
  connect \rdat $auto$memory_bram.cc:918:replace_cell$28
end
~~~~
